practitioners.name: Redhika
practitioners.text: I had a great experience with Malaysian Aesthetician Ms. Redhika , who recommended laser hair removal to me. She took the time to explain everything clearly and thoroughly, which really helped me feel confident and safe about going ahead with the treatment.

practitioners.name: Khurram
practitioners.text: Came in to see Dr Khurram at Knightsbridge for sofwave full face, neck and submental. It was very effective and the doctor was great. The clinic manager Farah made me feel welcome and Dr khurram spent so much time making me feel welcome and comfortable in my treatment.

practitioners.name: Diamod Skin - North Kensington
practitioners.text: Diamod Skin - North Kensington just horrible experience.  After 6 sessions of tattoo removal asking me to pay double of  the initial price .. and the procedures are done incorrectly in order to pay for more sessions.Lady ,honestly,  just avoid this place.

practitioners.name: Ifra
practitioners.text: Had a great consultation with Dr. Ifra – she’s knowledgeable, kind, and made me feel completely at ease. Looking forward to the next steps!

practitioners.name: rolla
practitioners.text: Dr rolla has been very helpful throughout the last few sessions and she has always been very good with the skin tone products.I couldn't be more happier

practitioners.text: I’m so happy with my experiences at Diamond Clinic and that’s all because of Sally. She’s so amazing and the way she delivers the treatment is so beautifully done and explained to perfection. Any worries you have she explains and reassures …

practitioners.text: I want to express my sincere appreciation Daniella Iacoban for the exceptional customer service provided in the realm of aesthetics. Your attention to detail, personalized care, and commitment to ensuring a positive experience truly set you …

about_section: Doctor- and nurse-led aesthetic and laser clinic in Wembley offering laser hair removal, tattoo removal (PicoSure / PicoWay / Q-Switch), skin resurfacing, fractional & pico lasers, injectables (anti-wrinkle & dermal fillers), body contouring (CoolSculpting / EMSculpt Neo / fat-dissolving), skin-revitalisation and dermatology-led consultations. Operates multiple London locations (Wembley, North Kensington / Ladbroke Grove, Knightsbridge). The clinic states it was established in 2010 and promotes >15 years of laser experience and multiple advanced laser platforms.
accreditations: ["Clinic states 'Doctor and Nurse-Led' and highlights use of advanced medical lasers and in-house training (claimed on official website).", 'Financial Conduct Authority (FCA) authorisation claim for acting as a credit broker (Klarna / finance options referenced on website).', 'Claims of staff with NVQ Level 4 and use of accredited CPD/in-house training (stated on website).']

Practitioners.Title: Laser Specialist
Practitioners.Specialty: Dermatology & Aesthetic Medicine — laser specialist (tattoo removal, laser skin resurfacing, pigmentation).
Practitioners.Education: Diploma in Dermatology, Middlesex University (listed on clinic team page)
Practitioners.Professional Affiliations: Clinic lists as part of DSL Clinic team; claims clinical qualifications on site.

Practitioners.Title: Aesthetic Nurse
Practitioners.Education: Not publicly listed (profile states 'Aesthetic Nurse, NMC Registered').
Professional Affiliations: NMC registered (claimed on clinic About/Team page — verification recommended via NMC register).

Practitioners.Title: Doctor (GMC-registered GP) / Aesthetics
Practitioners.Specialty: GMC-registered GP with a specialist background in dermatology; non-surgical face rejuvenation and laser procedures.
Practitioners.Education: Not publicly listed on clinic page (GMC registration claimed)
Professional Affiliations: GMC registered (clinic states GMC registration — verify on the GMC register).

Practitioners.Title: Doctor / Aesthetic Physician
Practitioners.Specialty: Dermatology, acne care, hair restoration, advanced injectable treatments.
Practitioners.Professional Affiliations: Listed as part of the DSL Clinic medical team on the website.

Practitioners.Title: Doctor / Aesthetic Physician
Practitioners.Specialty: Advanced aesthetics and regenerative medicine — Sofwave facial lifting, body contouring, advanced tightening treatments (P-Shot / O-Shot mentioned).

Insurace: No insurer panels are publicly listed.
Clinicians hold professional indemnity insurance through providers such as Cosmetic Insure and Medical Protection Society (MPS).
Where clinically indicated, treatment may be recognised by insurers such as Aviva Health and Aetna.
Insurance billing may be available when treatment is provided at recognised private hospitals.
Cosmetic and elective aesthetic procedures are typically excluded from insurance cover.
Insurance coverage is subject to individual policy terms and insurer approval.
Payments: 0% finance / payment plans via Klarna and other 0% APR options (clinic states DSL Clinic (UK) Ltd acts as a credit broker — Terms & Conditions).
Cash / other methods: Not explicitly listed (verify directly with clinic).

Fees.price: Promotional discounts (e.g., 50% OFF); full price ranges depend on treatment area and package
Not consistently published; typical entry-level filler / anti-wrinkle prices shown across booking platforms (varies widely) — user should request a written quote from clinic
Price depends on tattoo size and laser type; clinic advertises use of multiple advanced tattoo lasers but does not publish fixed single-price across platforms
